name: How much does biohazard cleanup cost and will my insurance cover it?

mainEntity.name: How much does biohazard cleanup cost and will my insurance cover it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Cost varies based on severity, extent of contamination, area size, and required remediation level, including labor, materials, equipment, and disposal fees. Insurance may cover costs, but deductibles and specific policy terms affect what you ultimately pay.
acceptedAnswer.description: Cost varies by severity and size, including labor and disposal fees; insurance may cover it depending on your policy terms.

description: Cost varies by severity and size, including labor and disposal fees; insurance may cover it depending on your policy terms.
